title: DPO Preference Data Collection
description: Pairwise preference annotation for Direct Preference Optimization, based on Rafailov et al., NeurIPS 2023. Annotators compare two model responses to a prompt, select a preference, rate alignment dimensions, and provide reasoning.
citation:
@inproceedings{rafailov2023direct,
    title = "Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model",
    author = "Rafailov, Rafael and Sharma, Archit and Mitchell, Eric and Ermon, Stefano and Manning, Christopher D and Finn, Chelsea",
    booktitle = "Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems",
    year = "2023",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.18290"
}
